## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Tests

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] Real OpenAI smoke test, if OpenAI SDK behavior changed
- [ ] Real Anthropic smoke test, if Anthropic SDK behavior changed
- [ ] Benchmark run, if latency or throughput changed

## Compatibility

- Provider SDK impact:
- Public API impact:
- Migration notes:

## Security And Privacy

- [ ] Does not send prompt payloads to external services by default
- [ ] Does not log secrets, prompts, or responses
- [ ] Budget enforcement failure behavior is explicit
